name: 仲恩生醫 Steminent
mechanism: 異體脂肪 MSC（旁分泌神經保護、誘導自噬清除突變 ataxin-3）
pipeline: Stemchymal®｜SCA1/2/3/6（pan-polyQ）：日本承認審查中（SCA3/6，優先審查）、台灣附款許可並行、美國 Ph2（UCLA+USF，2026，單臂＋自然史對照）
insight: 本社。手握台日 Ph2 隨機雙盲安慰劑對照正面數據 ＋ 日本優先審查 ＋ 最接近取證，是全賽道唯一有 Ph2 對照證據的資產。

updates.text: REPROCELL 送日本製造販賣『承認』申請（SCA3/6）＋『業』許可送神奈川縣

en.name: Steminent Biotherapeutics
en.mechanism: Allogeneic adipose MSC (paracrine neuroprotection; induces autophagy to clear mutant ataxin-3)
en.pipeline: Stemchymal® | SCA1/2/3/6 (pan-polyQ): under Japanese marketing review (SCA3/6, priority review), Taiwan conditional approval in parallel, US Ph2 (UCLA + USF, 2026, single-arm with natural-history control)
en.insight: Us. Holding positive randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled Ph2 data from Taiwan and Japan plus Japanese priority review, and closest to approval — the only asset in the field with controlled Ph2 evidence.

updates.text: REPROCELL filed the Japanese marketing approval application (SCA3/6) and the MAH business licence with Kanagawa Prefecture

name: Biohaven
mechanism: 小分子（麩胺酸調節，利魯唑前驅藥）
pipeline: Troriluzole（BHV-4157）｜pan-SCA：Ph3 全體終點未達、SCA3 次族群近顯著；NDA 遭 FDA CRL
insight: 最領先的口服對手但取證受挫：2025/11 FDA CRL、研發砍 60%。其真實世界外部對照證據不被 FDA 接受，反襯本社隨機對照的方法學優勢。

updates.text: 削減約 60% 研發支出、爭取與 FDA 再協商

en.pipeline: Troriluzole (BHV-4157) | pan-SCA: Ph3 missed in the overall population, SCA3 subgroup near-significant; NDA received an FDA CRL
en.insight: The most advanced oral rival, but blocked at approval: FDA CRL in 2025/11 and a 60% R&D cut. Its real-world externally controlled evidence was not accepted by the FDA, underscoring our randomised-controlled methodological advantage.

updates.text: Cut R&D spending by about 60% and sought further discussions with the FDA

name: Vico Therapeutics
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（CAG exon-skipping，源自 LUMC）
pipeline: VO659｜SCA1 / SCA3 / 亨丁頓舞蹈症（HD）：Ph1/2a 進行中（歐洲）
insight: 與本社在 SCA3 重疊、時程遠期。SCA3 CSF 突變 ataxin-3 未見下降、SCA 尚無明確療效，且有 radiculitis 神經根炎安全訊號（鞘內注射 vs 本社靜脈輸注）。

updates.text: 改半年一次給藥的 Ph1/2 收案

en.mechanism: Antisense oligonucleotide (CAG exon skipping, licensed from LUMC)
en.pipeline: VO659 | SCA1 / SCA3 / Huntington’s disease: Ph1/2a ongoing (Europe)
en.insight: Overlaps with us in SCA3 but is years away. CSF mutant ataxin-3 has not fallen in SCA3, there is still no clear SCA efficacy, and radiculitis has appeared as a safety signal (intrathecal dosing vs our intravenous infusion).

updates.text: Moved to dosing a Ph1/2 cohort on a twice-yearly regimen

name: Arrowhead / Sarepta
insight: SCA2 版的上游 gene-silencing，鞘內給藥；本社刻意避開台灣 SCA2 主因。與 Stemchymal（主 SCA3/6）非直接重疊，屬鄰域監控。

updates.text: Ph1（n=39）收滿、2026 年中停止收案，primary completion 估 2026/12

en.pipeline: ARO-ATXN2 | SCA2: Ph1 (NCT06672445) enrolment closed, sites include Taipei Veterans General Hospital
en.insight: The SCA2 version of upstream gene silencing, dosed intrathecally; the main reason we deliberately avoid SCA2 in Taiwan. It does not directly overlap Stemchymal (mainly SCA3/6), so this is adjacent-space monitoring.

updates.text: Ph1 (n=39) fully enrolled, enrolment closed mid-2026, primary completion estimated 2026/12

name: Biogen / Ionis
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（標的 ATXN3，非選擇性）
insight: 資源雄厚大廠退出 SCA3 賽道——標的對、載具送不到深部小腦。對含 SCA3 的 Stemchymal 屬正面。注意 Roche 亦持有 ATXN3 ASO 專利，ATXN3 空間不只一家。

updates.text: 宣布停止 SCA3 BIIB132 Ph1（研發優先化重整）

en.pipeline: BIIB132 (ION260) | SCA3: Ph1 (MERA) discontinued by the sponsor in 2023/04
en.insight: A deep-pocketed large-cap has left the SCA3 field — right target, but the vehicle could not reach the deep cerebellum. Positive for Stemchymal, which covers SCA3. Note that Roche also holds ATXN3 ASO patents; the ATXN3 space has more than one player.

updates.text: Announced it was stopping the SCA3 BIIB132 Ph1 (pipeline reprioritisation)

name: Cure Rare Disease
mechanism: 反義寡核苷酸 ASO（單股，標的 ATXN3）
insight: 非營利生技，技術與 Vico 同源自 LUMC。2025/05 獲 FDA 孤兒藥資格、CIRM $5.7M 補助。時程落後 Stemchymal 甚多，長線監測。

updates.text: 獲 FDA 孤兒藥資格（SCA3）

en.insight: A non-profit biotech whose technology comes from LUMC, the same origin as Vico’s. FDA orphan designation in 2025/05 and a $5.7M CIRM grant. Far behind Stemchymal on timeline; long-range monitoring.

name: uniQure 等 AAV 基因療法
pipeline: AAV 基因療法｜SCA（多型）：臨床前/早期，離臨床尚遠
insight: 學界與數家 biotech 探索中；uniQure AMT-150（AAV）近年已去優先化。屬遠期低威脅，反映共濟失調領域投資熱度。

en.name: uniQure et al. (AAV gene therapy)
en.pipeline: AAV gene therapy | SCA (multiple subtypes): preclinical/early, still far from the clinic
en.insight: Explored by academic groups and several biotechs; uniQure’s AMT-150 (AAV) has been deprioritised in recent years. A low, long-dated threat that mainly reflects investment appetite in ataxia.

name: Kissei 橘生製藥
mechanism: 小分子（TRH 類似物，症狀治療）
pipeline: Rovatirelin（KPS-0373）｜脊髓小腦退化（SCA6/31 等）：兩項 Ph3 主終點未達，日本藥證 2023/07 撤回、啟動追加 Ph3
insight: 症狀治療型對手，機轉與 Stemchymal 不同、屬間接參考。其 Ph3 失利反映 SCA 單一 Ph3 達標之難。

en.name: Kissei Pharmaceutical
en.pipeline: Rovatirelin (KPS-0373) | spinocerebellar degeneration (SCA6/31 etc.): two Ph3 trials missed their primary endpoint, the Japanese application was withdrawn in 2023/07 and an additional Ph3 started
en.insight: A symptomatic-treatment rival with a different mechanism from Stemchymal, so the read-across is indirect. Its Ph3 failure shows how hard a single Ph3 is to hit in SCA.

name: 學名藥 Riluzole
pipeline: Riluzole｜SCA（仿單外 off-label）：已上市，僅症狀緩解、無法改變病程
insight: 基準對照，非直接競品；SCA 屬 off-label 使用。

en.name: Generic Riluzole
en.pipeline: Riluzole | SCA (off-label): marketed, symptomatic relief only, does not modify disease course
en.insight: A baseline comparator rather than a direct competitor; use in SCA is off-label.
